text.title: Characterization Test Recipes Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a refactor candidate by preconditions → coverage → signoff. Branches name observable manifest features; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: legacy module callable, input samples reachable, snapshot lib present?

branch.question: Is the code being deleted entirely as part of the refactor?
Does the refactor include fixing a known bug in the current behavior?
Is branch_coverage_pct ≥ 70% on the target module?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → deleting_code=false → bug_on_purpose=false → branch_coverage=87 ≥ 70 → signoff complete → verdict=wrap-refactor (ref run-the-checklist).
